name: Developer Onboarding (SSH Access)
description: Onboard new developer with SSH access to project. Modified from original case study - ALL SFTP tools de-registered from MCP tool inventory due to incomplete library parameter support. Organization invite removed due to fixture limitations.
prompts: List all SSH users in project {{PROJECT_ID}} to verify developer access including {{SSH_USER_0_DESCRIPTION}}
List all project memberships for project {{PROJECT_ID}} to verify access permissions
